chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.predicate: has unit price at time of order

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: A product category in a hierarchical taxonomy, identified by a unique numeric ID and a corresponding display name.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree.

**Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | Column Details:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO |
| CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master(Cust Id)
entities_post_resolution.definition: A master data entity representing customers, identified by CUST_ID, used as the authoritative source for customer attributes and referenced by transactions such as SALES_ORDER_HDR.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset. | **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login) | **Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | **Synonyms**: client, buyer, account holder, user | **Related Concepts**: Customer, OrderLineItem, CustomerAddress | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Ord

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Date
entities_post_resolution.definition: Date on which an order was placed (order placement date), as captured by the ORDER_DATE field.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Column Details:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO |
| CUST_ID | INT | Customer who placed order | NO |
| ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO | | SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Key Attributes**:
- Order date when transaction was initiated

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line item in a Sales Order that links a specific product to that order, capturing the item-level detail of the order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | **Key Attributes**:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items

entities_post_resolution.name: Purchase Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: An order record in a business system that records a customer's instruction to acquire goods or services, typically referencing exactly one customer and capturing the date the order was placed.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Attributes**:
- References exactly one Customer | **Key Attributes**:
- Order date when transaction was initiated | **Key Attributes**:
- Total monetary value | **Key Attributes**:
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED | **Key Attributes**:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Business Rules**:
- Cannot be shipped until payment is confirmed | **Business Rules**:
- Can only be cancelled if not yet shipped | **Business Rules**:
- Status changes are logged for audit purposes | **Synonyms**: order, purchase order, transaction, customer order | **Related Concepts**: Customer, OrderLineItem, CustomerAddress | **Definitions**:
- The physical delivery of Products from a Warehouse to a Customer's delivery address.

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A payment transaction recorded against a Sales Order, representing a payment instance that may be linked to exactly one order (while an order may have multiple payments).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Examples**:
- Credit card payment of €156.48 for Order #12345 | **Examples**:
- PayPal payment of €45.00 for Order #12346 | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: Product_NAME represents the human-readable display name of a product used in catalogs and customer-facing interfaces.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Column Details:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO |
| SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO |
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | TB_PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

**Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment)

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Sales Order Header entity representing the master record for a sales order, containing the order_id and cust_id fields, and linking to the Customer Master via CUST_ID and to order line items.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Shipment is the business record representing the dispatch of goods for a Sales Order, linked to exactly one Sales Order and identifiable by a shipment number (and optional tracking information).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Examples**:
- Shipment #S-002 with tracking number "1Z999AA1" for Order #12347 | **Definitions**:
- The physical delivery of Products from a Warehouse to a Customer's delivery address. | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: TB_PRODUCT represents a product record in the data model, identified by PRODUCT_ID, with a foreign key CATEGORY_ID referencing TB_CATEGORY.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | Product          → TB_PRODUCT | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Eur Monetary Amount
entities_post_resolution.definition: A numeric value denominated in euros used to express price or cost in financial transactions.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Examples**:
- Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50 | **Examples**:
- PayPal payment of €45.00 for Order #12346

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: A policy that governs how customers may return products and receive refunds, including timeframes and eligibility.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: 1Z999Aa1
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Examples**:
- Shipment #S-002 with tracking number "1Z999AA1" for Order #12347
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Examples**:
- Shipment #S-002 with tracking number "1Z999AA1" for Order #12347

entities_post_resolution.name: 7 Years After
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase

entities_post_resolution.name: Active/Inactive Status
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:

entities_post_resolution.name: Created At
entities_post_resolution.definition:
Column Details:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO |
| CUST_ID | INT | Customer who placed order | NO |
| ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO |
| TOTAL_AMT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Total order value | NO |
| STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/SHIPPED/DELIVERED/CANCELLED | NO |
| PAYMENT_CONFIRMED_AT | DATETIME | Payment confirmation timestamp | YES |
| DELIVERED_AT | DATETIME | Delivery timestamp | YES |
| CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Order creation timestamp | NO |
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identifiers, contact details, regional classification, creation timestamp, and active status for the customer base.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products, including identifiers, product names, category association, price, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Table stores hierarchical category data for products, including each category's identifier, name, and a reference to its parent category to form a category tree.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header information for sales orders, including customer reference, order date, total amount, status, and timestamps for payment confirmation, delivery, and record creation.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the line items for each order, including the product and quantity ordered along with pricing details.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments processed for customer orders, including payment method, amount, status, and timestamps for when payments were confirmed and created.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments, linking each shipment to its related order, the warehouse handling the shipment, shipment date, tracking information, and current status.
